creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2009-01-07 18:40:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/p5-Sys-HostIP Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Sys::HostIP does what it can to determine the IP address
  of your machine. This module was tested on Irix, OpenBSD,
  FreeBSD, NetBSD, Solaris, Linux, OSX, Win32, and Cygwin.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Sys-HostIP/
  
  PR:             ports/130267
  Submitted by:   Murilo Opsfelder <mopsfelder at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1058    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/sysutils/p5-Sys-HostIP/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sys-HostIP/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sys-HostIP/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-Sys-HostIP/pkg-plist (new)
